---
title: 'Tired'
date: '2018-01-04T03:10:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7455751781890720671'
blogger_filename: '/2018/01/tired.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir="ltr">I don't think it's in my head. Flavia has been the hardest female to get along with in my life... </p>
<p dir="ltr">I want to come home and relax, and have a woman that tells me how great I am, and one that's easy to hang with... Then cuddles next to me in the couch...</p>
<p dir="ltr">Instead it's just a never ending cold distant disappointment I pick up from her.</p>
<p dir="ltr">Maybe it's her challenging me to be better, and other women were just satisfied with what I was... Then I left them because I want satisfied with who they were...</p>
<p dir="ltr">I could drone on about a thousand what ifs... But it is what it is and I'm here now.</p>
<p dir="ltr">So now what?<br><br><br><br><br><br><br><br></p>
